videos.description: Here is how I used ChatGPT to build a realistic health plan for my life 👀✨ I told it my age, height, weight, lifestyle, foods I actually like (and hate), that I want to lose weight healthily, that I’m doing Dry January, and that I need quick meals and realistic workouts. I asked it to: • build a calorie framework • create a gym plan I’ll actually stick to • suggest alcohol-free swaps • write recipes that fit my calories • create a shopping list This is the first time I feel like I have structure without restriction and I’m documenting the whole journey. ✨ Get Healthy With Chelsea ✨ starts now. #GetHealthyWithChelsea #NewYearsReset #DryJanuary #Weightloss #healthyhabits

videos.title: #AD | Always check your breast before date! It is Breast Cancer Aware...
videos.description: #AD | Always check your breast before date! It is Breast Cancer Awareness Month and @SPARIreland are making sure you don’t forget to check your breasts. You will see the breast before QR code in stores & when you scan, you will get a monthly reminder in your calendar to check your breasts. 1 and 7 Irish women will develop breast cancer on average but survival rate is extremely high with early detection which is why checking your breast is so important. If you notice anything unusual or any change, please contact your GP 💖 #breastbeforedates #spar #breastcancerawarenessmonth  #eurospar

videos.description: My mam’s 60th birthday drinks ✨ Queen Denise is still celebrating & tonight was an absolute ball! We booked an area in our local @The Kingswood Lodge & cannot recommend it enough for a party! Great food, the nicest staff & unreal entertainment! My mam was in her element dancing to 80’s classics courtesy of Miami Trice 👏🏻 Decor was all done by Bloom Dublin & to say I was blown away was an understatement! Suzanne went above and beyond - the Aperol Spritz sign was the Cherry on top! The cake was by the incredible @Beth’s Bakes who does all my cakes for me! She had gorgeous photos of my mam through her 60’s years and not only did the cake look amazing, it was DELICIOUS! Unreal night 🫶 #birthdayparty #birthdaycake #partydecor #dublinfood #dublinpub
